name: oneworld-explorer
description: Plan and validate oneworld Explorer round-the-world fare routes

scripts.build: npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/schedules && npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/core && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/web && npm run typecheck -w @oneworld-explorer/schedules
scripts.validate: npm run validate:country-map && npm run validate:traceability
